<!-- Keep PRs focused on one change. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue. -->

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, follow-ups, things you're unsure about. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for the behavior change (`mise run test`)
- [ ] Lint clean (`mise run lint`)
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] Works on macOS/Linux/Windows where relevant (no bash-only assumptions)
